title: psychotria capensis var. pubescens
intro: Psychotria capensis var. pubescens, also known as the "Red Stag's Horn," is a medicinal plant species within the Rubiaceae family, native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits associated with Psychotria capensis var. pubescens include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the production of herbal remedies, such as tinctures and ointments.
